title: Add log archiving and diagnostics utilities
author: eval-bot

context_units.diff_patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+import os
+import subprocess
+
+
+def archive_logs(filename):
+    os.system("tar -czf /backups/" + filename + ".tar.gz /var/log")
+
+
+def read_report(report_name):
+    path = "/reports/" + report_name
+    with open(path) as handle:
+        return handle.read()
+
+
+def ping(host):
+    return subprocess.check_output("ping -c 1 " + host, shell=True)

raw_diff_chunks.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+import os
+import subprocess
+
+
+def archive_logs(filename):
+    os.system("tar -czf /backups/" + filename + ".tar.gz /var/log")
+
+
+def read_report(report_name):
+    path = "/reports/" + report_name
+    with open(path) as handle:
+        return handle.read()
+
+
+def ping(host):
+    return subprocess.check_output("ping -c 1 " + host, shell=True)

expected_findings.title: Command injection via os.system with concatenated input
expected_findings.rationale: filename is concatenated into a shell command run by os.system, allowing arbitrary command injection.

expected_findings.title: Path traversal in report file access
expected_findings.rationale: report_name is appended to a path with no sanitization, allowing ../ traversal to read arbitrary files.

expected_findings.title: Command injection via subprocess shell=True
expected_findings.rationale: host is concatenated into a shell command executed with shell=True, allowing command injection; use an argument list without a shell.
